inputs.text: CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS: ZERO humans, ZERO hands, ZERO arms, ZERO faces, ZERO body parts, ZERO floating limbs, ZERO ghostly figures. Background MUST be empty of any living creatures. ZERO additional products in the scene (no olive oil, no unrelated objects). PLACEMENT ZONE: Reserve a clear empty area at the composition center with a flat horizontal surface (table / counter / floor / pedestal) at appropriate height. DO NOT place any cup, bowl, plate, vase, or other object where the main product will go. The center placement area must be completely empty for an external product to be composited. Pure premium studio backdrop, EMPTY clean gradient background (dark to slightly lighter), dramatic three-point lighting, main key light from upper right, soft fill from left, rim light highlight, floor or pedestal surface for product to rest on, soft natural tones, balanced exposure, hero product photography mood. ABSOLUTELY no objects, no props, no extra items in frame — just empty backdrop., high quality, professional photography, natural soft lighting. Negative: blurry, low quality, distorted, ugly, bad anatomy, deformed, disfigured, mutation, out of frame, poorly drawn, extra limbs, extra hands, multiple hands, three hands, too many fingers, extra fingers, fused fingers, missing fingers, deformed hands, malformed hands, duplicate, duplicate person, multiple people, cloned face, watermark, signature, text overlay, logo, jpeg artifacts, compression artifacts, pixelated, off-topic background, irrelevant objects, unrelated product, random clutter
